title: Rajasthan Tourism is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Rajasthan Tourism is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Rajasthan Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Rajasthan Tourism:
Rajasthan Tourism is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajasthan Tourism!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
